items.title: Fix prompt-router.ts: make input hook non-blocking
items.notes: The pi.on("input") hook currently awaits classifyAndRoute() which spawns Python (~160ms). Fix: return { action: "continue" } immediately, run classification + model switch in background (fire-and-forget). The model switch may race with the first LLM call, but that's acceptable — the alternative is blocking every submit.

items.title: Fix pwsh.ts: sanitize temp filename to remove illegal chars
items.notes: Line ~186: `tempFile = join(tmpdir(), \`pi-pwsh-${toolCallId}.txt\`);` — toolCallId comes from the LLM and can contain pipe chars (|) which are illegal in Windows filenames. Fix: sanitize toolCallId by replacing non-alphanumeric chars before using in filename.

items.title: T1: current-state routing boundaries + target architecture API
items.notes: Created current-state.md and target-architecture.md; verified command/classifier boundary refs and target API sections/open questions.

items.title: T2: define per-command subagent routing policy matrix
items.notes: Created subagent-policy-matrix.md and verified coverage for /research, /review-it, /do-it plus explicit routed-not-classified rule.

items.title: T3: write rollout and migration plan for command handlers
items.notes: Created rollout-plan.md with staged adoption path from /commit to /research, /review-it, /do-it and stage-specific verification.

items.title: Inspect external codebase in Downloads/src and identify notable workflow features
items.notes: Reviewed external src structure with parallel subagents and spot-checked key command files (commands.ts, review, tasks, memory, status, cost, permissions, plugin, ultraplan).

items.title: Audit current Pi workflow capabilities in this dotfiles/Pi setup
items.notes: Compared external workflow features against current Pi capabilities in pi/README.md, pi/extensions/*, and routing specs. Filtered out overlaps such as prompt routing, subagents, team dispatch, skills, safety hooks, quality gates, and workflow slash commands.

items.title: Export proposeCommitMessage from workflow-commands.ts
items.notes: Minimal export: add `export` keyword to proposeCommitMessage function so pure tests can import it

items.title: Add planner-failure fallback tests to workflow-commands-pure.test.ts
items.notes: Test proposeCommitMessage for: docs-only, test-only, pi/ files, hint override, >3 files body, always valid conventional commit. Also test parseCommitPlan error paths that trigger fallback.

items.title: Run targeted tests and report results
Create spec docs for Pi workflow features to borrow
items.notes: Created .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/plan.md and research-notes.md documenting all 7 shortlisted features, priorities, distinctness, and research questions for the top 3.

items.title: Research external solutions for features 1-3
items.notes: Launched parallel subagents for top-3 research and supplemented with direct web research. Documented external references and borrowable patterns in .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/research-notes.md.

items.title: Review parallel-agent test changes for /commit and prompt-router
items.notes: Reviewed new/expanded tests and supporting exports in pi/extensions/workflow-commands.ts and pi/tests/helpers/mock-pi.ts. Changes are coherent and test-focused.

items.title: Run targeted and full Pi tests after integrating agent changes
items.notes: Targeted /commit + prompt-router tests passed (60 tests). Full Pi test suite passed: 15 files, 215 tests.

items.title: Measure updated coverage and lizard complexity
items.notes: Configured coverage unchanged because vitest config excludes new /commit files. Targeted commit-related coverage improved to workflow-commands 73.7% stmts / 56.8% branch, prompt-router 84.12% stmts / 68.96% branch, model-routing 88.88% stmts / 91.66% branch. Lizard still reports 0 warnings.

items.title: Research Pi-native and Pi-adjacent implementations for features 1-3
items.notes: Ran Pi-specific web research across GitHub/package index for status/doctor, tasks dashboards, and permissions UX. Found multiple Pi-native implementations and Pi-adjacent forks/companions worth borrowing from.

items.title: Update Pi borrowed-features spec with Pi-specific web findings
items.notes: Updated .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/research-notes.md with a new section for Pi-native and Pi-adjacent implementations already on the web, including classification and revised recommendations.

items.title: Draft user stories and problem statements for Pi workflow features
items.notes: Added .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/user-stories.md with personas, problem statements, user stories, functional requirements, acceptance criteria, non-goals, and delivery phases for features 1-3. Updated plan.md to reference the requirements docs.

items.title: Review current Claude Code status bar implementation
items.notes: Reviewed claude/settings.json statusLine config, claude/claude-status Python wrapper, claude-status-go/main.go implementation, cross-platform hook guidance, and tracking/changelog notes for Windows/WSL behavior.

items.title: Draft MVP spec for Pi workflow operator features
items.notes: Created .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/mvp-spec.md with concrete MVP scope, build order, acceptance criteria, and trial checklist for status bar + doctor, task registry + /tasks, and /permissions inspect/reset/retry. Updated plan.md to reference it.

items.title: Create implementation checklist for Pi workflow operator MVP
items.notes: Created .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/implementation-checklist.md with phased tasks, likely files, dependency order, manual trial script, and MVP exit criteria. Updated plan.md to reference it.

items.title: Inspect current Pi /review-it workflow
items.notes: Inspected current review-it workflow and available Pi agents. Identified standard reviewers as reviewer, security-reviewer, and product-manager; mapped domain-specific experts from existing project-local Pi agents.

items.title: Update /review-it to require standard reviewers plus domain-specific reviewer suggestions
items.notes: Rewrote pi/skills/workflow/review-it.md so /review-it now instructs Pi to always launch three standard reviewers, select at least three additional topic-specific reviewers from available Pi agents, and use targeted rebuttal/discussion only when disagreement or severity warrants it.

items.title: Compare Pi /plan-it and /do-it workflows against Claude equivalents
items.notes: Inspect current Pi prompts and Claude command/shared instruction files for plan-it and do-it, then recommend whether Pi should be updated similarly.

items.title: Implement dynamic same-provider model ladder resolver
items.notes: Added shared dynamic model-routing logic in pi/lib/model-routing.ts. It now resolves small/medium/large models from the current session provider/model and available registry models, with same-provider and same-family policies plus best-effort current-model detection from ctx.

items.title: Add subagent model-size override support
items.notes: Extended the subagent tool to accept modelSize and modelPolicy and to override agent-frontmatter model pins at spawn time with a dynamically resolved same-provider/same-family model when requested.

items.title: Update workflow prompts and prompt router to use dynamic model ladder
items.notes: Updated /plan-it, /do-it, and /review-it prompts to use abstract small/medium/large model sizing tied to the current provider/model ladder. Updated prompt-router to resolve low/mid/high tiers dynamically via same-family routing. Added/updated tests for model routing and prompt router behavior.

items.title: Audit remaining subagent-using Pi workflows and lead agents for dynamic model sizing
items.notes: Updated /research and both standard + multi-team orchestrator/engineering-lead/planning-lead/validation-lead prompts to recommend dynamic modelSize/modelPolicy usage for subagent delegation, with medium-by-default and large-for-heavy-synthesis guidance.

items.title: Improve /router-status to show resolved current ladder
items.notes: Updated prompt-router /router-status to show the actual currently resolved low/mid/high ladder from the active session provider/model context, and added test coverage for the status output.

items.title: Audit remaining pi/skills/workflow prompts for dynamic model routing adoption
items.notes: Scanned all workflow skills. Only /research, /plan-it, /do-it, and /review-it needed dynamic routing guidance and were already updated. /commit and /gitlab-ticket do not use subagents or dynamic multi-model delegation, so no workflow prompt changes were needed there.

items.title: Update /commit planning to prefer small/mini dynamic routing
items.notes: Updated /commit planning to prefer a dynamic small/mini model from the current provider/model family when possible, with fallback to the previous OpenAI/GitHub mini preferences and then best-available small model. Updated commit workflow prompt text and expanded model-routing tests.

items.title: Implement LLM-adjudicated secret review in /commit
items.notes: Replaced /commit's regex-only secret blocking with hybrid scanning: deterministic candidate extraction plus small-model LLM adjudication over file-context snippets. Commit now blocks only on likely_secret or ambiguous findings. Updated workflow prompt text and added tests covering doc/example false positives and real secret-like content.

items.title: Tighten /do-it for plan-file execution and dynamic routing
items.notes: Rewrote /do-it to explicitly distinguish raw-task vs plan-file inputs, execute .specs/*/plan.md wave by wave, use specialist-first routing, and keep dynamic modelSize/modelPolicy guidance central to delegation.

items.title: Tighten /plan-it task sizing and validation guidance
items.notes: Rewrote /plan-it to assign explicit Agents alongside small/medium/large model sizes, strengthened wave/dependency rules, and added a formal self-validation checklist before presenting the generated plan.

items.title: Add workflow/docs coverage for dynamic routing and commit secret review
items.notes: Updated pi/README.md to document dynamic model ladders, richer workflow behavior for /plan-it /review-it /do-it, and the hybrid LLM-adjudicated /commit secret review flow.

items.title: Improve model-router status visibility and add smoke coverage for review-it
items.notes: Improved /router-status to show the detected current model in addition to the resolved low/mid/high ladder, and added workflow prompt contract tests covering /do-it, /plan-it, /review-it, and /commit as smoke coverage.

items.title: Inspect Pi workflow command files for /do-it, router status, and model observability
items.notes: Audited pi/skills/workflow/do-it.md, pi/extensions/workflow-commands.ts, pi/extensions/prompt-router.ts, pi/extensions/subagent/index.ts, pi/lib/model-routing.ts, and .specs/pi-subagent-routing-policy docs. Key gaps: /do-it lacks explicit plan-file mode, dynamic modelSize/modelPolicy guidance is non-operational because actual routes still use /team and /plan-it, and routing observability stops at classifier-tier visibility without actual current model / resolved subagent metadata.

items.title: Audit /plan-it, /review-it, /commit docs and tests for doc gaps
items.notes: Reviewed requested workflow docs, implementation, model routing, and tests. Prepared file-level doc/spec edit recommendations covering /plan-it agent/validation/wave consistency and README/workflow docs for dynamic model ladders, /review-it coordination, and /commit secret review.

items.title: Inspect /review-it implementation and existing workflow tests
items.notes: Reviewed workflow-commands.ts, review-it.md, prompt-router.ts, mock-pi helpers, subagent tests, and existing workflow/prompt-router tests. Confirmed there is no review-it-specific handler or prompt contract coverage today.

items.title: Assess lightweight smoke/contract harness options
items.notes: Confirmed a lightweight non-LLM harness is feasible: register workflow-commands on createMockPi, invoke review-it handler, assert sendUserMessage payload against the real review-it.md contract. Existing mock-pi is sufficient; no production changes required.

items.title: Inspect review-it prompt file for guardrail gaps
items.notes: Reviewed review-it.md; identified gaps around input validation, project-agent trust, evidence requirements, and repo-context verification

items.title: Summarize file-level test recommendations and coverage gaps
items.notes: Prepared concise recommendation: prefer dedicated /review-it contract smoke around workflow-commands + real review-it.md content, with optional explicit prompt-router /review-it skip test. Identified untested prompt invariants and current lack of handler coverage.

items.title: Trace workflow command plumbing for /review-it
items.notes: Reviewed workflow-commands.ts handler; found raw prompt interpolation and duplicate unsanitized Args injection with no path validation

items.title: Synthesize concise findings and recommended edits
items.notes: Prepared concise findings with severity, locations, and recommended file-level edits

items.title: Audit /plan-it workflow guidance for agent assignment, self-validation, and wave/dependency consistency
items.notes: Reviewed pi/skills/workflow/plan-it.md plus supporting docs and identified gaps around agent assignment, self-validation, and wave/dependency invariants.

items.title: Audit user-facing Pi docs for dynamic model ladders, /review-it coordination, and /commit secret review
items.notes: Reviewed pi/README.md, workflow skill docs, workflow command descriptions, model routing helper, and tests; identified user-facing doc gaps and file-level recommendations.
